title: add --dns* flags to buildah bud
body:
close #1438 
use --dns* flags to change /etc/resolv.conf in the container during the build.
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Looks like you did not include some files in the pkg/resolvconf directory.
Also we need some tests added to prove this works.

Need updates to man pages and completions.
Add tests. Fixed docs/buildah-bud.md and completions
vendor from vendor/github.com/docker/libnetwork and pass the tests
